allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('version:', d['version']\); print\('main:', d.get\('main'\)\); print\('exports:', json.dumps\(d.get\('exports',{}\)\)[:200]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Price:', d.get\('regularMarketPrice'\), '| Change:', d.get\('regularMarketChangePercent', 0\).__round__\(2\), '%'\)")
Bash(curl -s "https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/AAPL" -H "User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 \(Macintosh; Intel Mac OS X 10_15_7\)" --max-time 10)
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'{len\(d\)} items'\); print\([\(i['symbol'], i['signal']\) for i in d[:5]]\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Bars: {len\(d[\\"bars\\"]\)}, Signal: {d[\\"recommendation\\"][\\"signal\\"]}, RSI: {d[\\"recommendation\\"][\\"currentRSI\\"]}'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'{len\(d\)} indices'\); [[print\(i['symbol'], i['price'], i['changePercent'].__round__\(2\)\) for i in d[:5]]]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Bars: {len\(d[\\"bars\\"]\)}, Signal: {d[\\"recommendation\\"][\\"signal\\"]}, Demo: {d.get\(\\"_demo\\", False\)}'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Cash: \\${d[\\"cash\\"]:.0f}, Equity: \\${d[\\"totalEquity\\"]:.0f}, Positions: {len\(d[\\"positions\\"]\)}'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Bot enabled: {d[\\"config\\"][\\"enabled\\"]}, Mode: {d[\\"config\\"][\\"mode\\"]}, Scans: {d[\\"scanCount\\"]}'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Proxy OK — Cash: \\${d[\\"cash\\"]:.0f}, Equity: \\${d[\\"totalEquity\\"]:.0f}'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('bars:', len\(d.get\('bars',[]\)\), 'source:', d.get\('source','?'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in d.items\(\) if k != 'chart'}, indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); proj=d.get\('projections',[]\); print\('annualReturn:', d.get\('annualReturn'\), 'projections:', len\(proj\)\); [print\(p['label'], p['retP50']\) for p in proj[:3]]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\({k:v for k,v in d.items\(\) if k != 'chart'}\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); r={k:v for k,v in d.items\(\) if k!='chart'}; print\(json.dumps\(r,indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('price:', d.get\('regularMarketPrice'\), 'source:', d.get\('source','yahoo'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(type\(d\), len\(d\) if isinstance\(d,list\) else d\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'{len\(d\)} items'\); [print\(f'  {x[\\"symbol\\"]:12} {x[\\"price\\"]:8.2f} {x[\\"signal\\"]}'\) for x in d[:5]]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'{len\(d\)} indices'\); [print\(f' {x[\\"symbol\\"]:12} price={x[\\"price\\"]:8.2f} chg={x[\\"changePercent\\"]:+.2f}% sparkline={len\(x[\\"sparkline\\"]\)}pts'\) for x in d[:5]]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('price:', d.get\('regularMarketPrice'\), 'source:', d.get\('source'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(x['symbol'], x.get\('regularMarketPrice'\), x.get\('source'\)\) for x in d]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('bars:', len\(d['bars']\), 'source:', d['source'], 'signal:', d['recommendation']['signal']\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'{len\(d\)} items — primeros 5:'\); [print\(f'  {x[\\"symbol\\"]:12} \\${x[\\"price\\"]:8.2f} RSI={x[\\"rsi\\"]:.0f} {x[\\"signal\\"]}'\) for x in d[:5]]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('screener items:', len\(d\)\)")
